sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state and UI elements
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print("Current nodes (gameplay area only, rows > 9):")
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    minr, maxr, minc, maxc = min(rows), max(rows), min(cols), max(cols)
    if minr > 9:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} hash={n['hash']} rows={minr}-{maxr} cols={minc}-{maxc}")

print("\nUI nodes (top area):")
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    minr, maxr, minc, maxc = min(rows), max(rows), min(cols), max(cols)
    if maxr <= 8:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} hash={n['hash']} rows={minr}-{maxr} cols={minc}-{maxc}")

# Check the top-right area for buttons
print("\nTop-right region (rows 0-8, cols 50+):")
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    minr, maxr, minc, maxc = min(rows), max(rows), min(cols), max(cols)
    if minc >= 50 and maxr <= 8:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows={minr}-{maxr} cols={minc}-{maxc}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
